title: Geffen Gift Reshapes Access: Yale Drama scraps tuition with $150m; graduates gain real freedom
summary_full: Yale's David Geffen School of Drama removed tuition fees with a $150 million donation. This move opened doors for talented students previously excluded by financial barriers. The initiative aims to democratize the theatre industry by fostering a more diverse talent pool. Graduates can now pursue their artistic passions without immediate financial burdens, enriching the entire creative landscape.
